快3幸运计划群高手群【网：59FC·CC】【网：95FC·CC】【QQ：5075273】【网：35FC·CC】<浏览器手动输入网址>【首单返利50%】【来富彩，马上发】【富彩祝您】【鸿运当头好运来】【财源滚滚为您开】【精彩纷呈乐不停】【大奖小奖进家门】JINYUAN666《金源导师》<br>原文翻译及赏析_作者李白<br>青天有月来几时？我今停杯一问之。<br>人攀明月不可得，月行却与人相随。<br>皎如飞镜临丹阙，绿烟灭尽清辉发。<br>但见宵从海上来，宁知晓向云间没。<br>白兔捣药秋复春，嫦娥孤栖与谁邻？<br>今人不见古时月，今月曾经照古人。<br>古人今人若流水，共看明月皆如此。<br>唯愿当歌对酒时，月光长照金樽里。<br>[![66.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/SsTM0tXD/66.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/hzmjTs1d)<br>[![67.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/C1kx7PGg/67.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/CBM0L4rP)<br>[![68.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/NM6QmycS/68.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/r0p6LwzN)<br>[![82.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/4NNXHNSg/82.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/z3Ms95Nt)<br>[![83.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/DwRhNQy8/83.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/K17CkMT2)<br>[![84.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/1XWhrwj1/84.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/dZTxqkF5)<br>------------------<br>vk.com/topic-238909201_64148627<br>vk.com/topic-238900130_63604651<br>vk.com/topic-238909250_63604657<br>vk.com/topic-238716044_62486890<br>vk.com/topic-238909188_62985934<br>vk.com/topic-238909189_63298108<br>vk.com/topic-238909182_63093010<br>vk.com/topic-238909172_63093029<br>vk.com/topic-238909177_63934674<br>vk.com/topic-238909196_62845078<br>vk.com/topic-238909175_62401897<br>vk.com/topic-238909179_63298178<br>vk.com/topic-238909186_62845118<br>vk.com/topic-238832529_63298198<br>vk.com/topic-238909176_62845131<br>vk.com/topic-238883641_64149005<br>vk.com/topic-238897971_64149070<br>vk.com/topic-238909206_62845272<br>vk.com/topic-238901981_64149193<br>vk.com/topic-238909190_63605081<br>vk.com/topic-238865024_62487278<br>vk.com/topic-238909253_62718930<br>vk.com/topic-238904827_63935047<br>vk.com/topic-238909188_62986412<br>vk.com/topic-238909178_62986420<br>vk.com/topic-238865068_62986501<br>vk.com/topic-238909182_63093509<br>vk.com/topic-238909172_63093517<br>vk.com/topic-238909196_62845547<br>vk.com/topic-238909185_62402356<br>vk.com/topic-238909173_62719119<br>vk.com/topic-238831088_62986520<br>vk.com/topic-238909186_62845596<br>vk.com/to
